===================
=== Bob Dylan - Hollywood December 16th 1978_Info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN - Hollywood, Florida December 16th 1978 (Transfer from Tape, JTT)

BOB DYLAN
Hollywood Sportatorium
Hollywood, Florida
December 16th 1978

Poor Audience Recording (Completist)

SOURCE: Low Generation Cassettes (GS) > Akai GX95 11 (Playback) > Soundforge PRO 10c >
FLAC Frontend Level 6 Align on Sector Boundaries

Mastering & Artwork by JTT

DISC TWO: 78.57
01. MY BACK PAGES
02. SHE'S LOVE CRAZY
03. MR. TAMBOURINE MAN
04. SHELTER FROM THE STORM
05. LOVE MINUS ZERO/NO LIMIT
06. TANGLED UP IN BLUE
07. BALLAD OF A THIN MAN
08. MAGGIE'S FARM
09. I DON'T BELIEVE YOU
10. LIKE A ROLLING STONE
11. I SHALL BE RELEASED
12. SENOR (TALES OF YANKEE POWER)
13. THE TIMES THEY ARE A-CHANGIN'
14. RAINY DAY WOMEN # 12 & 35
15. IT AIN'T ME, BABE

DISC ONE: 79.38
01. AM I YOUR STEPCHILD
02. ONE MORE CUP OF COFFEE (VALLEY BELOW)
03. BLOWIN' IN THE WIND
04. GIRL FROM THE NORTH COUNTRY
05. WE BETTER TALK THIS OVER
06. MASTERS OF WAR
07. JUST LIKE A WOMAN
08. ALL ALONG THE WATCHTOWER
09. TO RAMONA
10. IT'S ALRIGHT, MA (I'M ONLY BLEEDING)
11. DO RIGHT TO ME BABY (DO UNTO OTHERS)
12. FOREVER YOUNG 
13. CHANGING OF THE GUARDS
14. I'LL BE YOUR BABY TONIGHT

JTT, October 2011

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
PLEASE DO NOT CONVERT TO LOSSY FILES AND UPLOAD LINKS ON EXPECTING RAIN OR OTHER SITES
++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
